ai_summary: Adani Enterprises Limited has issued a correction to the stock exchanges regarding a typographical error in a media release dated July 10, 2026, which announced the 'AdaniDioxycle Partnership to Advance Low-Carbon Chemical Manufacturing'. The correction clarifies that the original media release inadvertently stated the date as July 9, 2026, instead of July 10, 2026, with all other content remaining unchanged. This is a minor administrative correction that presents no material financial or operational impact or any significant red flags for the company.
